name: Jack Henry / Symitar (Core Banking)
description: System of record for member accounts, deposits, and loan servicing. Originating source for nearly every reported financial figure.

name: Thought Machine (Ledger)
description: Cloud-native ledger and posting engine. Authoritative for transaction-level financial events; reconciliation target for the GL.

name: General Ledger
description: Aggregated financial postings, journal entries, allowance and reserve balances, and the figures that feed board and regulatory reports.

name: Lending Origination
description: Loan applications, funding, charge-offs, and sales. Source of the portfolio balances that diverge from the CFO's GL figures.

name: Snowflake (Data Warehouse)
description: Consolidated analytical store feeding Tableau. Where transformations occur between source systems and reporting.

name: Tableau (BI & Reporting)
description: Board and regulatory dashboards. Visualizes aggregated figures but carries no native lineage back to source — the audit-evidence gap.

name: Audit / GRC System
description: Audit items, findings, evidence requests, remediation tracking, and control documentation. Where the audit delay is measured.
